mapper.select: select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, entry_type as entryType, amount as amount, description as description, reference_id as referenceId, created_at as createdAt from tenant_wallet_ledger where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by created_at asc
mapper.insert: insert into tenant_wallet_ledger (id, tenant_id, entry_type, amount, description, reference_id, created_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{entryType}, #{amount}, #{description}, #{referenceId}, #{createdAt}) on conflict (id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, entry_type = excluded.entry_type, amount = excluded.amount, description = excluded.description, reference_id = excluded.reference_id, created_at = excluded.created_at
mapper.select: select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, channel as channel, status as status, amount as amount, description as description, reference_id as referenceId, qr_code as qrCode, created_at as createdAt, paid_at as paidAt from tenant_payment_orders where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by created_at desc

select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, channel as channel, status as status, amount as amount, description as description, reference_id as referenceId, qr_code as qrCode, created_at as createdAt, paid_at as paidAt from tenant_payment_orders where id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: insert into tenant_payment_orders (id, tenant_id, channel, status, amount, description, reference_id, qr_code, created_at, paid_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{amount}, #{description}, #{referenceId}, #{qrCode}, #{createdAt}, #{paidAt}) on conflict (id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, channel = excluded.channel, status = excluded.status, amount = excluded.amount, description = excluded.description, reference_id = excluded.reference_id, qr_code = excluded.qr_code, created_at = excluded.created_at, paid_at = excluded.paid_at
mapper.select: select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, scope_type as scopeType, scope_id as scopeId, dimension as dimension, limit_value as limitValue, used_value as usedValue from tenant_quota_allocations where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into tenant_quota_allocations (id, tenant_id, scope_type, scope_id, dimension, limit_value, used_value) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{dimension}, #{limitValue}, #{usedValue}) on conflict (id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, scope_type = excluded.scope_type, scope_id = excluded.scope_id, dimension = excluded.dimension, limit_value = excluded.limit_value, used_value = excluded.used_value
